rumor.detail: Scored penalty vs Sekhukhune United; continues regular features for Chiefs.

newIntel.reasoning: New match performance detail (penalty vs Sekhukhune, May 11) post-dates latest rumor (May 8). Confirms active status and scoring form.

rumor.detail: Kaizer Chiefs turned attention to Golden Arrows midfielder Maxwele.

rumor.detail: Agent Makaab: if genuine Chiefs interest, approach must come from club directly.

newIntel.reasoning: New agent statement (May 9) post-dates latest rumor (May 5). Makaab's comment indicates continued Chiefs interest and readiness to engage, escalating from passive speculation to potential active pursuit.

needsReview.detail: Disciplinary suspension (5 matches, GHS 20k fine) confirmed by GFA for March 8 incident; season effectively ended.
